Shadow Break Control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x90
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Shadow of LCR[6] (BC) allowing direct break control without read-modify-write on LCR. Only present when SHADOW is configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] sbcr rw 0x0 SBCR

Field Descriptions

sbcr - SBCR

Shadow Break Control. Forces sout low to generate a break. 0=normal, 1=break.
